title: Represent and Composite Color Deliberately
summary: Build and verify css color formats in survey palette notation and alpha-compositing audit through prediction, inspection, explanation, cumulative code, and changed-case transfer.
objectives: Explain css color formats from purpose, behavior, and evidence.
Apply css color formats without discarding earlier valid work.
Diagnose the named misconception in changed content, input, and failure states.

steps.title: 04 · Read the survey palette notation and alpha-compositing audit case · theory
steps.instruction: Checkpoint 4: Which claim preserves css color formats when data, input, and layout change? Scenario: survey palette notation and alpha-compositing audit.
steps.why: Represent and Composite Color Deliberately makes the decision observable and testable. This is checkpoint 4 in survey palette notation and alpha-compositing audit.

content.text: Named colors, hexadecimal, rgb(), hsl(), hwb(), lab(), lch(), oklab(), and oklch() are different coordinate systems for representing color; notation alone does not improve accessibility. Alpha blends foreground with what is behind it, so the final displayed color and contrast depend on every layer. Modern perceptual spaces can make controlled lightness and chroma changes easier to reason about. Apply it to survey palette notation and alpha-compositing audit.
